task.title: Normalize Topic Hierarchies
task.shortdesc: Restructure topic organization so map navigation and topic relationships are consistent and auditable.

prereq.p: Generate discovery and plan artifacts for the package that you want to refactor.

step.cmd: Identify flat or overloaded sections from map relationship output.

info.codeblock: jq '.relationships[] | select(.type=="topicref") | .source' build/discovery.json | sort | uniq -c | sort -nr

step.cmd: Group topics by functional section and define target hierarchy paths.

info.p: Capture proposed grouping in a migration note or plan review checklist so your team can review hierarchy intent before apply mode.

step.cmd: Update planning logic or plugin action emission to route topics into section-aware target paths.

info.p: Use deterministic target conventions such as target/topics/<section>/<topic>.dita.

step.cmd: Run dry-run and confirm action targets match intended hierarchy.

result.p: You establish predictable topic grouping that supports navigation quality and faster downstream maintenance.
result.codeblock: copy_topic targets reflect section-aware paths example: target/topics/getting-started/intro.dita
